title: Walk-in Drive Financial Analyst at SIDBI Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Financial Analyst at SIDBI Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
SIDBI Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Jabalpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About SIDBI Ventures Solutions:
SIDBI Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SIDBI Ventures Solutions!
